author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 869bf3af. Added all_to_all (equal-split), all_to_all_single_uneven (per-peer send/recv sizes for MoE routing / distributed sort), and reduce_scatter_tensor alias matching PyTorch's dist API. Deadlock-safe lower-rank-first send/recv ordering. 7 new tests; 95 ferrotorch-distributed tests pass.
